titleStmt.title: SII 11.48: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 48. (B.K. No. 10 of 1926-27). GADAG, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE PRĀKĀRA OF THE TRIKŪṬĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: The inscription belongs to the reign of Iṟivabeḍeṅgadēva and records a grant of land at Maḻteyavāḍa in Purigeṟe-nāḍu made by his vassal Mahāsāmanta Sōbhanarasa, who possessed the ‘five great sounds’ and the epithets, ‘Kannana-baṇṭa’, ‘Kaṭakaprākāra’ and ‘Giridurgamalla’. He is described as a ‘bee at the lotus feet of Āhavamalladēva’ and is stated to have been governing over the Beḷvola Three-Hundred, Purigeṟe Three-Hundred, Kunduru Five-Hundred and Kukkanūru Thirty divisions. The grant was made as vidyādāna to Kāḷajñāni Vakkhāṇi-Jīya, the disciple of Koppina-Vakkhāṇi-Jīya, who was the student (vidyā-śishya) of Pūliya-Paṇḍita, of the temple of Svayaṁbhudēva at Kardugu, i.e., the modern Gadag, which was an agrahāra in the Beḷvola-nāḍu. The inscription is dated Śaka 924, Śubhakṛit, Chaitra, śuddha 5, Sunday, which corresponds to A.D. 1002, March 22, Sunday.
Mahāsāmanta Sōbhanarasa has been noticed in Nos. 45 and 47 above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrī . svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ sa
tyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka nakaḷaṁkacaritaṁ śrīmadiṟivabeḍengadēvera rājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhi pra
varddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsā
mantaṁ pratyakṣabhūriśravaṁ pusiyilladātaṁ gaṇḍaṁ kannanabaṇṭaṁ kaṭakaprākāraṁ giridurggamallaṁ
raṇavīraṁ śrīmadāhavamalladēvapādapaṁkajabhramaraṁ śrīmatsōbhanarasa rbbeḷvola mūnūṟumaṁ puri
geṟe mūnūṟumaṁ ku(ṁ)ndu raynūṟumaṁ kukkanūru mūvattumaṁ duṣṭanigrahaviśiṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁ sukhasaṁ
kathāvinōdadi nāḷuttamire sakabhūpāḷakāḷākrāṁta saṁvatsarasataṅga 924 neya śubhakṛtsaṁvatsaraṁ pra
varttise tadvarṣābhyantarada caitra suddha 5 Ādityavāradandu beḷvolanāḍoḷagaṇa Agrahāraṁ kardugina sva
yaṁbudēvare dēgulada pūliyapaṇḍitara vidyāśiṣya rkkoppina vakkhāṇijīyara śiṣyarappa kāḷagnāni
vakhkhāṇijīyargge dhārāpūrvvakaṁ vidyādānamāge purigeṟenāḍoḷagaṇa maḻteyavāḍada teṁkkaṇa po
ladoḷage yaṇnigeṟeya gōlo ḷsarvvabādhāpariyaraṁ sarvvanamaśyaṁ koṭṭa mattar nūṟu
Adaṟa sīmeya dese yentendoḍe(ṁ) teṁkaṇabhāgaṁ kaḻtelevāḍada polaṁ paḍuvaṇa bhāgaṁ paḷḷaṁ
mūḍaṇa bhāgaṁ kardugina ntu mūṟuṁ deseya guḍḍeya ndūḷīśānyada deseyoḷ kardugi
na polada mēreya dāsanasaile teṁka kardugina polada kaḻtelevāḍada polada mugguḍḍeya bēḷa
da maraṁ vāyavyādoḷ nneya matturoḷagaṇa saile Intī muguḍḍeyāge koṭṭadu .
vṛttaṁ . santatiyi mukhyasā raṇasiṅgada poṁge
poṁgi vikrāntamu māya mū mukhya yanādeṁ sāmanta neṁdī
ṇaṁ giridurggamallanaṁ . svādita riyaṁtrataṁtrōditaṅga ḷavāryya
śāle tanna tyāgi kōṭiye pēḻado
ya prabhāvaṁ giridurgga mallanaṁ . saṁkalpa ntanēkaguṇayukta nanaṅgavirōdhi yante nissaṁgatacitta naṅgaruciyaṁ
takaḷaṁkayaśaṁ śaśāṁkarēkhāṁkita nudāttacaritaṁ riyapēḻdu parākramā haraṁ paṁkajajātana
nte guṇiyennadorā rggiridurggamallanaṁ . Uṇḍu caturaṅgabalamene guṇḍamuṇḍu mahādurgga muṇḍu bhujabala
mendāreṁṭuṇḍuṇisidoḍaṁ nileyiṁ negaḻda kannanabaṇṭaṁ . ślōkaṁ . madvaṁśajāḻparamahī
pativaṁśajā vā pāpādapētyamanasā bhuvi yē pāḷayanti mama dharmmamimaṁ samastaṁ tēṣāṁ ma
yā viracitāṁjaḷirēṣa mūrdhni . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kāḷē kāḷē pāḷanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvā
nētānbhāginaḥ pārtthivēndrō bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . Ī śāsanada mēreyūḷsvayaṁbudēvargge
biṭṭa dharmmamaṁ rakṣisidātaṁ vāraṇāsikurukṣētrārgghetīrtthaṁprayāge Intivaroḷsūryyagrahaṇadandu pañca ma
hādānaṁ geydu kratuśatamaṁ ya koṭṭa phalama neyduguṁ mattida nachedātaṁ vāraṇāsiyoḷ kavi
leyaṁ kurukṣētradoḷ brāhmaṇaraṁ rado ḷeḷkōṭiyuva naḻida mahāpātaka nakkuṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā
yō harēti vasundharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ kāḷidāsayyaṁ baredaṁ ©
© saivōja rūvāribhairavaṁ narakarige nurāga ṇipa
ṟadu mandira keṁśesura doreyalla daccarisuva śiḷakāṁsyavidyeyoḷu saivuganaṁ ©
Digital edition of SII 11.48 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
